response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems (notably Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec), strong craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev), and exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or bias/rollout-risk management — the core of this role. Title is 'Senior,' not Principal/Staff-equivalent leadership across multi-team initiatives, and growth/measurement platform work is absent. Worth a screen to probe experimentation depth, but not a clear principal-level fit on paper.
strengths: Polyglot 13+ years across JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D, Python-adjacent stacks
Distributed/high-throughput experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, mentoring, public workshops/talks
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flag platform experience
No evidence of Principal/IC6-scope multi-team initiative leadership or stakeholder alignment at that level
Limited explicit telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical/bias-detection work
